name: Auto DEVLOG & Credit Tracker
description: Automatically updates DEVLOG.md with time tracking, Kiro credits used, struggles, and refactorings after each task session

action.message:
📝 **AUTO-DEVLOG UPDATE**

Task session completed! Please update documentation:

**Update DEVLOG.md:**
- Add current task details to appropriate spec section
- Include actual time spent vs estimate
- **⭐ Track Kiro credits used in this session**
- Update the Kiro Credits Usage table with running total
- List all files modified/created (highlight NEW and CRITICAL FIX items)
- Detail any struggles, debugging processes, configuration issues

**Kiro Credits Tracking Format:**
```markdown
## Kiro Credits Usage

| Date | Spec | Task | Credits | Running Total |
|------|------|------|---------|---------------|
| Jan 26 | S01 | Tauri scaffold | 5 | 5 |
| Jan 26 | S02 | Screen capture | 3 | 8 |
```

**Update Spec Files:**
- Add Time Tracking section to tasks.md with variance explanation
- Add Lessons Learned section documenting critical issues

**Documentation Style:**
- Use emojis (🚨🔧📊🧪✅❌⭐)
- Bold important items
- Include Kiro credit count per task
- Write like an engineering journal

**Make it comprehensive** - capture what was built, HOW it was built, problems encountered, and **credits consumed**!
